raw_consumer_statement: I booked a hotel on XXXX through citi travel portal. Unfortunately my flight got delayed and I called the hotel. The hotel suggested me to call citi travel agents since I booked it through them. I called them twice and they promised me to solve the problem and gave me the update, But they end up doing nothing until I called them again next morning. Eventually the hotel charged me fully with money plus citi thank you points. I made a dispute and they judged it was my responsibility. I called their customer service and they cheated me that I won the case.
